---
title: "Biostatistical Topics"
code-copy: hover
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: sentence
    canonical: true
---

{{< include ../_tool-chooser.md >}}

### Short Course

-   [2025 RISW: Graphical multiple comparison procedures Combining flexibility with optimality](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1YZqlKCmT3M6afCzAD2fEhQJA1-dBLaXa/view?usp=drive_link)
